overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character ascending through a multi-level futuristic urban plaza. The character climbs two wide staircases between red concrete walls, traverses neon-lit vendor areas with palm trees, and explores an elevated walkway overlooking a busy street with distinctive orange vending kiosks and futuristic architecture.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete staircase enclosed between tall red walls. The lighting transitions from shadow to bright sunlight as the character approaches the top, where palm trees become visible against the sky.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the second staircase in bright sunlight, passing other pedestrians going in both directions. Orange vending kiosks become visible at the top of the stairs as the character approaches the upper level.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open-air elevated promenade lined with orange vending kiosks and benches. The distinctive Building 03 tower rises in the distance as the character approaches an overlook of the street below.

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the edge of the upper level overlooking a busy street with the Building 03 tower now to the left. The character descends stairs toward street level, passing green umbrella structures and viewing sparse vehicle traffic below.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the lower street level past blue kiosks and traffic barriers. The area features vending machines and advertisements while maintaining views of the surrounding futuristic architecture and street infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends through a multi-level futuristic plaza before descending back toward a bustling urban street. It begins with a climb up a wide concrete staircase enclosed by tall red walls, where the lighting shifts from deep shadow to bright sunlight as palm trees emerge at the summit. The camera then glides through a semi-covered plaza filled with purple neon vendor stalls before ascending a second sunlit staircase past other pedestrians toward a series of orange vending kiosks. This movement opens onto an elevated promenade with the Building 03 tower looming in the distance, eventually leading the character to an overlook of the city below. Finally, the scene shifts downward as the character descends past green umbrellas to the lower street level, moving through an area of blue kiosks and traffic barriers amidst the surrounding futuristic architecture.
